body.title: Augment preferred_paths via scan of recent Sonnet diffs
body.result: Created lab/claudecode/preferred_paths_scan.py: PathScanReport scans 60d git history for 6 deprecated patterns (raw-psql, channel-direct, print, new-MemoryType, feature-flag, direct-db-write). Outputs candidates for Akien review before any palace node is added. Smoke test found 6 psycopg2 hits in 7 days.
body.description:
Scan the last ~60 days of git history for fallback-pattern hits — places where Sonnet wrote a deprecated form when a preferred form existed. Use git log --grep + diff inspection to find candidates. For each candidate pattern that recurs ≥3 times, draft an addition to theigors/rules/preferred_paths/.

Output is a draft list of pairs Akien reviews before merge. Tool lives at lab/claudecode/preferred_paths_scan.py.

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/preferred_paths_scan.py. Adds palace nodes after Akien review.
**Design rules:** no persistence (read-only git scan). oop-first: PathScanReport class. docs-in-code: top-of-file docstring.
**Test plan:** scan produces a candidate list with ≥3 occurrences each on the current repo. Manual review confirms each candidate is a real fallback pattern (not a false positive).
